channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: Orban Ordered Seizure of Ukrainian Gold Shipment
item.description: Hungarian PM Viktor Orban personally ordered the seizure of a Ukrainian bank convoy in retaliation for the suspension of oil transit through the Druzhba pipeline, according to Hungarian media reports.

item.title: Iran Launches New Attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain
item.description: Iran conducted fresh drone and missile attacks targeting Kuwait and Bahrain as US Central Command conducted self-defense strikes on an Iranian military ground control station on Qeshm Island.

item.title: Denmark Gets First Government With Majority Women Ministers
item.description: For the first time in Danish history, the new cabinet will consist of more women than men as the PM presents a new government coalition.

item.title: US May Consider Placing Nuclear Weapons in Poland and Baltic States
item.description: While discussions are ongoing, an agreement to expand US nuclear hosting was not imminent, according to an unnamed source cited by the Financial Times.

item.title: Ukraine Strikes Russian Warship at Baltic Fleet Base
item.description: Ukraines Unmanned Systems Forces released footage of drones striking a Russian warship armed with guided missiles at the Kronstadt naval base near St Petersburg.

item.title: Iranian Attack Hits Kuwait Airport
item.description: Iranian drone and missile attack heavily damaged Kuwait International Airport facilities and wounded several people.

item.title: France Restricts Israeli Presence at Europe's Biggest Defense Show
item.description: The restrictions come amid strained relations between Paris and Jerusalem over Israel's military operations in Lebanon.

item.title: UK China Ice Age Thaws as West Needs Beijing
item.description: Britain's foreign secretary visits Beijing as Western nations reassess their approach to China amid economic pressures and geopolitical shifts.

item.title: Financial Times: Netanyahu and Trump in Heated Call Over Lebanon
item.description: Trump reportedly called Netanyahu 'f---ing crazy' during a profane phone call about Lebanon, exposing deep fissures between the allies.

item.title: Norway Joins French Nuclear Deterrence Program
item.description: Norway becomes the ninth country to sign up for French nuclear deterrence cooperation as European nations seek alternatives amid uncertainty about US commitments.

item.title: Haaretz Live: Trump-Netanyahu-Lebanon-Iran Developments
item.description: Israeli newspaper provides live updates on the diplomatic tensions between Trump and Netanyahu and ongoing regional developments.

item.title: Tunisian Court Sentences Ennahdha Leader to Life in Prison
item.description: Rached Ghannouchi, leader of Tunisia's main opposition party, receives life sentence in latest crackdown on dissent.

item.title: Iran's Reza Pahlavi and Return of Secret Police
item.description: Reports emerge of former crown prince's supporters reviving elements of the notorious SAVAK secret police amid political turmoil.

item.title: NYT: Ukraine Strikes St Petersburg as Putin's Economic Forum Opens
item.description: Ukrainian drone attack hit an oil terminal in St Petersburg coinciding with Russia's flagship economic forum, forcing evacuations.

item.title: Cuba's Doctors Program Under Strain Across Latin America
item.description: CNN examines the challenges facing Cuba's medical diplomacy program as countries across Latin America reassess the arrangements.

item.title: NYT Interactive: Iran's Nuclear and Uranium Developments
item.description: New York Times provides an interactive examination of Iran's nuclear program and uranium enrichment activities.

item.title: Israel's Mossad Gets New Chief as Netanyahu Vows to Topple Iranian Regime
item.description: New Mossad director assumes role as Netanyahu pledges regime change in Iran amid ongoing regional conflict.

item.title: Israel Begins Seizing Palestinian Land Around West Bank Archeological Site
item.description: Haaretz reports on Israeli moves to take control of Palestinian land near archaeological sites in the occupied West Bank.

item.title: BBC: Israel's Adventures in Lebanon Give Iran Second Chance
item.description: Analysis of how Israeli operations in Lebanon have inadvertently created opportunities for Iranian influence to reassert itself.

item.title: BBC: Israeli Fire Kills Three in Gaza Over Past Day
item.description: Palestinian health officials report Israeli military actions killed three people and wounded 35 in Gaza over the past 24 hours.

item.title: BBC: IDF Officials Say US Lebanon Intervention Creates War Planning Uncertainty
item.description: Israeli military officials express concern that American diplomatic intervention has complicated their operational planning for Lebanon.

item.title: BBC: Netanyahu Opposes His Own Coalition's West Bank Antiquities Bill
item.description: Israeli PM Netanyahu reportedly opposes legislation backed by his own coalition partners regarding archaeological sites in the West Bank.

item.title: BBC: Bill Dissolving Knesset Passes First Hurdle
item.description: Legislation to dissolve Israel's parliament and call early elections advances through initial parliamentary procedures.

item.title: BBC: Israel's Top Judge Warns Against Efforts to Undermine Election Results
item.description: Supreme Court president cautions against attempts to delegitimize electoral outcomes as Israel heads toward early elections.

item.title: Trump Confirms Calling Netanyahu F---ing Crazy in Heated Lebanon Call
item.description: US president confirms reports of profane phone call with Israeli PM over Lebanon policy differences.
